title: bouteloua stolonifera
intro: Bouteloua stolonifera, also known as blue grama grass, is a perennial grass native to North America that grows in the prairies of the Great Plains region. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bouteloua stolonifera include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of blue grama grass can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
